aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Bronco Plumbing, Heating & Air due to their solid local presence, but lack of conversational content and structured data limits their visibility.

Create content targeting conversational AI queries like 'best HVAC services in Roseville.'

critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content limits AI citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC services in Roseville' or 'top-rated HVAC providers'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and creating blog posts targeting local HVAC queries.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, create FAQ content, and develop conversational blog posts to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; act now to capture market share.
